title: Discrimination claim
legend: What type of discrimination is the claimant claiming?

detailsText.p1: Discrimination is when someone is treated unfairly and the treatment is related to any of the protected characteristics from the 2010 Equality Act. The claimant has rights at work if they have experienced discrimination.
detailsText.p2: See the GOV.UK guidance (opens in new tab) for further information on protected characteristics and workplace rights.

race.hint: including colour, nationality, and ethnic or national origins

claimTypeDiscrimination.required: Please select at least one type of discrimination.
